goals: Store initial personal preferences and communication style for future sessions
Search for previously stored preferences to verify recall
List all stored memories to review what has been captured
Delete an outdated or incorrect memory entry

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and eager to learn, but somewhat uncertain about processes. Asks follow-up questions to clarify understanding. Values efficiency and clear guidance.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic communication concepts from coursework but has no technical knowledge about memory systems, APIs, or how preference storage works internally. Treats the assistant as a knowledgeable peer mentor.

end_condition: The student has successfully stored their preferences, verified they can be retrieved, reviewed all stored memories, and removed any unwanted entries. The student confirms their memory management is complete.
